params.name: The Ambassadors
params.description: Holbein’s The Ambassadors shows two French envoys at the English court, surrounded by symbols of science, religion, and politics. A warped skull hidden in the foreground reminds viewers of mortality. The painting reflects Renaissance tensions between knowledge and faith.
